'''vomalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keening|keening]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keening|keening]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vomalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomalithi|vomalithi]] || [[word:vomaliji|vomaliji]] || [[word:vomalishi|vomalishi]] || [[word:vomaliki|vomaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomaluthuthu|vomaluthuthu]] || [[word:vomalujuju|vomalujuju]] || [[word:vomalushushu|vomalushushu]] || [[word:vomalukuku|vomalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomaluthu|vomaluthu]] || [[word:vomaluju|vomaluju]] || [[word:vomalushu|vomalushu]] || [[word:vomaluku|vomaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomalufthuf|vomalufthuf]] || [[word:vomalufjuf|vomalufjuf]] || [[word:vomalufshuf|vomalufshuf]] || [[word:vomalufkuf|vomalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomalethe|vomalethe]] || [[word:vomaleje|vomaleje]] || [[word:vomaleshe|vomaleshe]] || [[word:vomaleke|vomaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomalothotho|vomalothotho]] || [[word:vomalojojo|vomalojojo]] || [[word:vomaloshosho|vomaloshosho]] || [[word:vomalokoko|vomalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomalotho|vomalotho]] || [[word:vomalojo|vomalojo]] || [[word:vomalosho|vomalosho]] || [[word:vomaloko|vomaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomalofthof|vomalofthof]] || [[word:vomalofjof|vomalofjof]] || [[word:vomalofshof|vomalofshof]] || [[word:vomalofkof|vomalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfthÃŸf|vomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfjÃŸf|vomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfshÃŸf|vomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfkÃŸf|vomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vomalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vomalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vomalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vomalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfthÃŸf|vomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfjÃŸf|vomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfshÃŸf|vomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfkÃŸf|vomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfthÃŸf|vomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfjÃŸf|vomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfshÃŸf|vomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vomalÃŸfkÃŸf|vomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomalÃḊthÃḊ|vomalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vomalÃḊjÃḊ|vomalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vomalÃḊshÃḊ|vomalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vomalÃḊkÃḊ|vomalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomalathatha|vomalathatha]] || [[word:vomalajaja|vomalajaja]] || [[word:vomalashasha|vomalashasha]] || [[word:vomalakaka|vomalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomalatha|vomalatha]] || [[word:vomalaja|vomalaja]] || [[word:vomalasha|vomalasha]] || [[word:vomalaka|vomalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomalafthaf|vomalafthaf]] || [[word:vomalafjaf|vomalafjaf]] || [[word:vomalafshaf|vomalafshaf]] || [[word:vomalafkaf|vomalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vomalasha|vomalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomalshÃḋsha|vomalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomalrosha|vomalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomalmusha|vomalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomalyasha|vomalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomalnkshÃḋsha|govomalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomalnkrosha|govomalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomalnkmusha|govomalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomalnkyasha|govomalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vomamalasha|vomamalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomamalshÃḋsha|vomamalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomamalrosha|vomamalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomamalmusha|vomamalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomamalyasha|vomamalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomamalnkshÃḋsha|govomamalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomamalnkrosha|govomamalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomamalnkmusha|govomamalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomamalnkyasha|govomamalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vemÃḊlasha|vemÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vemÃḊlshÃḋsha|vemÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vemÃḊlrosha|vemÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vemÃḊlmusha|vemÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vemÃḊlyasha|vemÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govemÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|govemÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govemÃḊlnkrosha|govemÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govemÃḊlnkmusha|govemÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govemÃḊlnkyasha|govemÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vomfalasha|vomfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomfalshÃḋsha|vomfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomfalrosha|vomfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomfalmusha|vomfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomfalyasha|vomfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomfalnkshÃḋsha|govomfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomfalnkrosha|govomfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomfalnkmusha|govomfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomfalnkyasha|govomfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
